01:26:587 (6) - Not sure if 1/8 is the best idea here; the pattern before this is quite dense so it might be very easy to break on this cause of tight timing window the 1/8 slider gives here. 1/4 would be good enough simplification to represent this sound well and wouldn't give that much tension.

For example this 1/8 transition 01:02:187 (1,2) is miles better as it's right after the slider. so you can more focus on hitting it.
